arts.ttl: How to watch Leicester vs Chelsea - TV channel, kick-off time and live stream
arts.sum: Here, football.london takes a look at the TV info needed to follow Leicester City vs Chelsea in the Premier League. The Blues travel to the King Power Stadium, where they will take on Enzo Maresca's former employers, Leicester City, in their first match after the November international break after being held to a draw with Arsenal last time out.

arts.ttl: I never should have joined Chelsea from Leicester - I wasted best years of my career - football.london
arts.sum: More recently, Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall took the step up from Leicester to join Chelsea and Cesare Casadei enjoyed a fine brief loan spell at the club in the Championship last season. He spent over two years on loan away from west London with Burnley, Aston Villa, Kasimpasa and Reading before leaving the Blues in 2022 upon the expiry of his contract.

arts.ttl: Enzo Fernandez and Noni Madueke drop early Chelsea team news hint as Joao Felix role revealed
arts.sum: Then, on returning to the King Power Stadium, Maresca said: "First of all, excited and also thankful because it was a fantastic season. Enzo Fernandez and Noni Madueke have dropped an early team news hint ahead of Chelsea's clash against Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Chelsea: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Leicester host in-form Chelsea in the Premier League on Saturday lunchtime. Preview includes team news, how to watch and more.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Predicted Lineup vs. Leicester City: Premier League
arts.sum: Chelsea take on Leicester City without captain Reece James as Premier League action resumes.

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca becomes first Premier League manager to speak out on David Coote... after referee was suspended for calling former Liverpool boss Jurgen Klopp a 'German ****' in leaked video
arts.sum: Coote is not on the fixture list this weekend as he was suspended after an old video emerged of him calling Jurgen Klopp a 'German ****' and Liverpool 's***'.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues identify £14.8m striker as Victor Osimhen, Alexander Isak alternative?
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly earmark Ipswich Town striker Liam Delap as a potential transfer target for the summer of 2025 due to his exceptional 'transfer metrics'.

arts.ttl: Chelsea eye Ipswich's Delap - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Chelsea eye move for Ipswich's Liam Delap, Liverpool and Arsenal battle for Real Sociedad's Martin Zubimendi, Joshua Zirkzee's Manchester United future in doubt.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca ‘thankful’ for connection at Leicester ahead of return with Chelsea
arts.sum: Maresca led the Foxes to the Sky Bet Championship title last season before joining Chelsea on a five-year contract over the summer.
